uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds GNSS uplink; expected data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (frame.lat -33.86, frame.lon 151.21, speed_kmh 0, hdop 0.8, used_sat 11, in_movement false; header battery 50%) and re-shaping its gnss frame to the normalized vocabulary.

uplink.description: GNSS fix, moving, with a temperature frame
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds GNSS + temperature uplink; expected data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (gnss frame.lat 12.5, frame.lon -3.25, speed_kmh 30, hdop 1.5, used_sat 7, in_movement true; temperature frame temperature_cel 23.5; header battery 88%) and re-shaping to the normalized vocabulary (speed km/h -> m/s, temperature_cel -> air.temperature).
Synthetic frame header with type 0x99 (153), which reference/upstream-codec.js reports via unknownFrame() as error_type 'unknown_frame'.
The generic protocol is carried only on FPort 10; reference/upstream-codec.js only runs Decode() for fPort 10.
